_provenance: Schema-derived from AC-P2.7.4. Tie-breaker order: (1) largest symphony by value, (2) oldest position, (3) lexicographic on symphony_id. Epsilon for tie detection: 1% of the smaller dollar amount per spec.
description: Two symphonies with identical L1 scores (within epsilon). Tie broken by largest value.

derivations.tie_detection: abs(0.0 - 0.0) = 0.0 <= epsilon = 0.01 * min(0, 0) BUT scores are literally equal. Epsilon = 1% of smaller dollar amount. When both scores are 0.0, delta=0 which is <= any positive epsilon -> tie confirmed.
derivations.tie_breaker: AC-P2.7.4 step 1: largest symphony by value. sym-Y.total_value=25000 > sym-X.total_value=15000. sym-Y wins.
